text_block_list.text:
I run into King Halo one morning as I'm heading
to the academy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
One more time... I'll check with my camera just
one last time...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! I'm hideous! My face... My skin is so dull
and lifeless!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Y-you really think so? I-I think you look as cute
as always...

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I know! Why don't you use a camera filter to
brighten yourself up a bit?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No! Unacceptable! There will be no compromise!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Natural beauty shines through even without a
filter! My regal brilliance cannot be allowed to
fade!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, I'm reevaluating my daily routine,
diet included. And you two will be joining me!

King Halo appears to be having some issues with
her complexion...
